description.zh:
嘿，听我说，我这次需要点帮忙，不过不是你想象中的那种任务。这事儿更偏向避税和洗白资金那块，你懂我意思吧？让我直接说明白点...

我做这门生意，账面必须得漂亮，不能让人看出来是在灰色地带搞事。我又不能亲自满世界去收购弹药，这不符合我商人的形象！如果我身边那些合作人发现我压根不从外面进货，他们肯定一个个跑光，到时候整个局面都要崩！所以，我现在需要你出手相助，当然，你不会白干的。

我会收购你手头上不想要的子弹，任何口径都行，只要没损坏就行。你能帮这个忙吗？
description.en:
Hey there! Listen I need a favor, nothing you would expect. It's more about taxes and clean money. See where I'm going with this? I'm just gonna explain it to you...

You see, I can't just have this kind of business without keeping accounting properly. I can't just walk around asking for certain goods like ammunition, I got a reputation to maintain! And if my associates see that I barely buy anything from others, they'll just walk away and stop working with me, this will be catastrophic! So I need a bit of help here to avoid future trouble, you will be rewarded of course.

I will buy any bullets that you want to get rid of, alright? And I mean any. As long as they are intact of course. Can you help with that?
